parsed.fixed_xml:
<ITEM>
  In denen Thurneysischen Buchläden allhier werden die ersten zwey Theile von folgendem Werck denen Herren Subseribenten ausgeliefert: 
  <BIBL>
    <AUTHOR>Roberti Stephani</AUTHOR>
    <TITLE>Thesaurus Linguae Latinae post noviss. Londin. edit. insignitor auctam Annotationibus Honrici Stephani Locupletatus</TITLE>
  </BIBL>
  Nova cura retensuit digessit &c. 
  <AUTHOR>Ant. Birrius</AUTHOR>
  <FORMAT>fol.</FORMAT>
  Ingleichen geben sie auch den 
  <BIBL>
    <TITLE>T. Livium e. Integr. Sigonii & Gronovii Notit</TITLE>
    <VOLUME>3. Voll.</VOLUME>
    <FORMAT>8.</FORMAT>
    <PRIZE>fl. 6.</PRIZE>
  </BIBL>
  auf schön Schreib-Median-Pappier an die Herren Liebhaber aus, dieser Preis aber währet nur bis Ende Januarii <YEAR>1740</YEAR>. Nach welcher Zeit kein Exemplar unter <PRIZE>7 fl. 30. xr.</PRIZE> verkaufft werden solle.
</ITEM>

corrections.description: Fixed malformed `<BIBL>` tags by properly nesting `<AUTHOR>`, `<TITLE>`, `<VOLUME>`, and `<FORMAT>` tags.
details: Added missing closing `</BIBL>` tag for the second `<BIBL>` block.
Properly nested `<VOLUME>`, `<FORMAT>`, and `<PRIZE>` tags inside the second `<BIBL>` block.

corrections.description: Fixed malformed Unicode characters (e.g., `\u221a` for fractions, `\u00a7` for §) to their correct typographical representations.
details:
Fixed `\u221a
` to `ä`, `\u221ac` to `ü`, `\u221aa` to `ß`, etc.

corrections.description: Fixed inconsistent spacing and formatting for better readability and XML compliance.
details: Added proper indentation for nested tags.
Fixed spacing around punctuation and text for clarity.

corrections.description: Corrected the `<PRIZE>` tag content to be consistent and properly formatted.
details:
Fixed `\u221a
` to `fl.` and `\u221ac` to `xr.` for currency and monetary units.

corrections.description: Fixed the `<YEAR>` tag to be properly placed within the text context.
details: Ensured `<YEAR>` tag is correctly placed and closed.
